steps.text: Write the normal temperature range as an inequality: $97.8 \leq T \leq 99$ (inclusive on both ends).

• Choice A — $97.7^{\circ}\text{F}$: $97.7 \lt 97.8$, below the lower bound. Incorrect.
  • Choice B — $97.6^{\circ}\text{F}$: $97.6 \lt 97.8$, below the lower bound. Incorrect.
  • Choice C — $97.9^{\circ}\text{F}$: $97.8 \leq 97.9 \leq 99$, within the normal range. That confirms C is correct.
  • Choice D — $99.7^{\circ}\text{F}$: $99.7 \gt 99$, above the upper bound. Incorrect.
